commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor/maintainer runtime proof and conflict resolution, not a narrow automated code repair with a line-level defect.; Cleared: The diff changes Command Code parsing/state handling, in-memory notification transition logic, focused tests, and changelog only; no concrete security or supply-chain concern was found. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Command Code usage fetching and quota/session notification handling so transient subscription enrichment failures do not reset depleted-notification state, with regression coverage and a changelog note.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main can return nil subscription data after an optional Command Code subscription timeout/failure, then clear `lastKnownSessionRemaining` on the no-window path before a later successful depleted snapshot re-enters the startup-depleted branch; I did not run live provider or Keychain-backed notification validation under AGENTS.md policy.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor/maintainer runtime proof and conflict resolution, not a narrow automated code repair with a line-level defect.

target.title: fix(commandcode): stop repeated 'session depleted' notification after flaky subscription fetch
target.body:
## Summary

- Distinguish optional subscription lookup failure from a valid free-tier response.
- Treat unsuccessful subscription response envelopes as transient enrichment failure while preserving required credit data.
- Preserve paid monthly depletion only when prior live state proves a recognized subscription.
- Keep purchased credits visible for free-tier accounts without fabricating paid-plan restoration.
- Stabilize consecutive enrichment failures without repeating depleted notifications or quota warnings.
- Keep transient provenance live-only and out of persisted snapshots.
- Add contributor changelog credit.

## Proof

- `swift test --filter CommandCode`: 25 tests passed on the exact integrated head.
- `make check`: format and strict lint clean.
- Full-branch Codex autoreview clean, confidence 0.82.

Exact candidate: `2b028c43ba92bd9c33faeb170d70d3e63de2ff02`.

Fixes #1624.
target.author: lpfchan
